text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hmmmm... What to choose... What to choose...
choice_data_list: Can't decide what to have for lunch?
Can't decide what to have for lunch?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I can't decide between Falco or Vodka.
choice_data_list: By which you mean... what exactly?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Why are you looking at me like that? They
ordered different things off the menu, so I can't
decide which of the two I should get.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Being able to eat the same exact meals as my
oshis every day is a luxury only afforded when
attending this sacred institution, Tracen
Academy!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Yesterday, I had Ryan's lunch, and
Tamamo's the day before that! Oh, but don't
worry! I'm making sure to keep my diet balanced!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
If it's a day I choose Spe or Oguri, I'm always
careful to get a more manageable portion.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Eating the same lunch as my oshis is an official
method to infinitely expand one's imagination.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want to intervene, but that'll just drag the
conversation on longer, so I keep quiet and hand
her a lunch tray.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oohoohoo... You wanna geek out together over
lunch? ♪ I know, why don't you choose for me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whose lunch do you think looks better? Falco's or
Vodka's?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Falco's lunch! She likes her plates to look
photogenic!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All right, Falco always eats her salad first, so I'll
be following sui—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hey, Digital! Is it okay if I sit next to you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Fwah! Falco?! Um? Uhhh, we can just move,
actually!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Nooo, that's not what I want! I'm asking if we can eat together.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You're her trainer, right? You don't mind if I join,
do you?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ehehehe, thanks! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, just as I thought! You got the same thing I
did! I caught a glimpse of your tray, and it made
me curious.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Agyaaaa! I'm sooo sorry for copying you!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Is that your way of showing respect? I'm really
flattered! ☆ Ooh, I wanna take a selfie!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
A fan told me earlier that she wants to attend
Tracen Academy, so I thought it'd be nice if I
posted some pics to show her what campus life is
like.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You're doing this for your fan? O-ohhh! You're
such a model Umadol! Sublime... to the max!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So, can I post a pic of you and your lunch on
Umatter too?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Pwah?! A picture with m-m-m-me?! I mean, if it's
for one of your fans, then I guess it'll be in service
to a comrade, but...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, then let's take one together! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ooh, this one looks good!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if she'll see my post. You know, she told
me she's good at running on dirt too.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's why I wanted to respond to her letter by
showing off some training methods. So, how do
you usually train, Digital?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I don't know if this will be of any use or not, but... I try to run on the dirt practice course when it's firm and when it's heavy.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So you do special training on tracks with bad
footing! It's hard to keep good form in those
conditions, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Not only that, I get a lot of people to run with
me... It helps me practice dealing with dirt and
sand flying at me from up ahead.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, I see what you mean! I'm a front runner so I
don't usually have to deal with that.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You've really got your dirt training in order!
Hmmm, I'd better watch my back.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Nononono! You're still in a whole different league
than me!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Don't think you can trick me into letting my guard
down! ☆ I've marked you as my rival now.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ggk... Ghk... Nghhh! I-I'm... not... wooorthy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Agnes Digital and Smart Falcon spend
a fruitful lunchtime talking about how they
practice for dirt races.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Okay! Let's dig in with Vodka's lunch!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: "Hey! What's the big idea, sitting next to me?!"

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
"It's not like I'm sitting next to you because I want
to. This is the only seat that's free. That's all."

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You totally got it! You really are a simp after my
own heart!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I get so immersed imagining Vodka's
conversations while enjoying the same food she
eats!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Fwhoa! Vodka just stole one of Scarlet's shrimp...
"Excuse you! You think it's okay to just snatch
other people's food?!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Agnes Digital spends the entire lunch
period imagining a dialogue between Vodka and
Daiwa Scarlet... like a true superfan.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wooo! I'm stuffed! That's what I call a fulfilling
lunch!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Digital, do you have a second? There's
something I'd like to check with you.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Were you mimicking us back in the cafeteria?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Eeek! I'm s-s-s-soo sorry! I'll make it up to you!
I'll... I'll harakiri!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Harakiri?! Why?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Cause you're scarin' the crap outta her. Look at
how she's shakin'...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... A real-life quarrel between Scarlet and Vodka, right in front of me... Guehehe.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
This ain't a fight! I'm just callin' her out for puttin'
you on the spot, right?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...It's not like I'm angry or anything. I just thought
it was incredible you could hear us from that
distance. Your hearing must be amazing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I was just imagining what I thought you might
be saying... I couldn't hear your conversation at
all.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You were just imagining it?! But you were dead on
for the whole conversation! Are you sure you
weren't lipreading or something?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
N-no, it was really just my imagination. Um, by
the way... how come you guys noticed what I was
doing?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Like anyone couldn't notice, you were practically
shoutin' at your trainer.
choice_data_list: I guess you were so into it you didn't realize.
I guess you were so into it you didn't realize.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'm so sorry! I don't deserve to live!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: You gotta say sorry each time? It isn't that deep!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, you really recreated our whole
conversation just by imagining it? That's pretty
damn amazin'.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
...I think it just goes to show how thoroughly she's
researched us.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
In that case, lemme do some research of my own!
Come run with me, Digital! Best way to grasp your
opponent is to duke it out with 'em!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hey, that's no fair! You can't hog her! I want to
run with Digital too!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What? Quit tryna butt in!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
A match against me would help Digital get
serious. ...Oh, but I see. You're scared I'm going
to beat you, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
As if! That's totally my line! Fine, all three of us
can run!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
A-all three of us? I've got VIP seats to a battle
between Scarlet and Vodka?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: WOOHOOOOOAGHKJ!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital is walking on sunshine... and the
group running session after school turns out to be
a very fruitful practice.
